results.rendered_html:
arbhaka (von arbha)
1〉 adj.
a〉 klein  NAIGH. 3,2 .  NIR. 3,20 . 4,15 . namo mahadbhyo namo arbhakebhyo namo yuvabhyo nama āśinebhyaḥ  ṚV. 1,27,13 . 114,7 . 4,32,23 .  AV. 11,2,29 . 19,36,3 .  VS. 16,26 . = svalpa  UṆĀDIK. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— b〉 schwach, gering, wenig: paricchinnā bharatā arbhakāsaḥ  ṚV. 7,33,6 . na bahavaḥ samaśakannārbhakā abhi dādhṛṣuḥ  AV. 1,27,3 . 7,56,6 .
— c〉 mager  MED. k. 46 .
— d〉 jung, kindisch: arbhako na kumārako 'dhi tiṣṭhannavaṃ ratham  ṚV. 8,58,15 . nahi vo astyarbhako devāso na kumārakaḥ 30,1 .
— e〉 ähnlich (sadṛśa)  UṆĀDIK. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 2〉 m.
a〉 Knabe, Kind  AK. 3,4,1,3 . 13,48   MED. k. 46 .  RAGH. 3,21 . 25 . 7,64 .  KATHĀS. 24,208 . 25,101 . das Junge eines Thiers  AK. 2,5,38 .  ŚĀK. 14 , v. l. śakulā˚  H. 1345 . Nach  Uṇ. 5,53 : arbhaka.
— b〉 Thor, einfältiger Mensch  MED. k. 46 .

results.rendered_html:
arbhaka a. [According to  Nir.  avahṛtaṃ bhavati hrasvaṃ tasmādarbhakaḥ.]
1 Small, minute, short; namo mahadbhyo namoarbhakebhyaḥ  Rv. 1. 27. 13. 
2 Weak, emaciated, lean.
3 Foolish.
4 Young, childish.
5 Like, similar.
— kaḥ
1 A boy, child; śrutasya yāyādayamaṃtamarbhakaḥ  R. 3. 21 , 25 , 7. 67. 
2 The young of an animal.
3 A fool, idiot.
